name: Nectarine Yogurt a La Donna
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the sliced nectarines in a medium-sized mixing bowl.
2. Mash the nectarines with a mashing device until they are lumpy.
3. Add the 4 packets of Equal while continuing to mash the nectarines so that the Equal mixes well.
4. Stir in all other ingredients.
5. Refrigerate for half an hour.
6. Transfer mixture to an ice cream freezer and follow manufacturer's instructions.
